pages.text: The $(thing)Import Bus$() automatically pulls items from an adjacent container (chest, hopper, other mod's storage) into the Magic Storage network.

$(thing)Placement:$() Place the Import Bus $(thing)facing toward$() the container you want to pull from. The front face (as placed) must be against the container.$(br2)The bus connects to the network by being adjacent to any other Magic Storage block.

$(thing)Operation:$()$(br)$(li)Works every $(thing)10 ticks$() (0.5 seconds)$(li)Pulls up to $(thing)one full stack (64 items)$() per operation$(li)Uses the container's $(thing)item handler capability$() for extraction$(li)Auto-finds the network Core, throttled when no Core is present$(br2)The bus will not pull from other Magic Storage blocks - it only interacts with non-network containers.

$(thing)Use cases:$()$(br)$(li)Auto-dump chest contents into the network$(li)Connect quarry/farm outputs directly to storage$(li)Chain multiple buses for high-throughput imports$(br2)Each bus operates independently with its own 10-tick cooldown. Multiple buses mean faster import rates!
